name: Parmesan Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine melted butter, Dijon mustard, Worcestershire sauce, and salt.
2. Place the bread crumbs and grated Parmesan cheese in a plastic bag.
3. Dip each chicken breast half into the butter mixture, then shake it in the crumb mixture to coat evenly.
4. Arrange the coated chicken breasts in an ungreased 13x9x2 inch baking pan.
5. Drizzle any remaining butter mixture over the chicken.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 40-45 minutes, or until the chicken is no longer pink and juices run clear.
Yield: 6-8 servings
